title: Recovered appeal: land located to the south-east of Bottesford (ref: 3340258 - 25 February 2025)
body: "Decision letter and Inspector’s Report for a recovered appeal for the construction of a solar farm, together with all associated work, equipment and necessary infrastructure. Land located to the south-east of Bottesford, comprising land to the south of the A52, to the west of Easthorpe Lane and Muston village, to the north of the Grantham Canal, to the east of the Winter Beck, and accessed from, and including land to the east of, Castle View Road. "
